title: crotalaria edmundi-bakeri
intro: Crotalaria edmundi-bakeri, also known as Edmund-Baker's rattlebox, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria edmundi-bakeri include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria edmundi-bakeri is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
